$comment: C11/C23 6.7.5 (D-CSUBSET-ALIGNAS-VARIABLE-CODEGEN): an over-aligned global `alignas(32) int g;` lands 32-byte aligned in its data section; a runtime address check (&g & 31 == 0) gates the exit. exit = 42. Data-model-independent (32-byte alignment holds under LP64 + LLP64), so the one exit code holds across all four targets incl. the shipped release pipeline. Red-on-disable: revert the asm raiseToExplicit override and the global aligns to its natural 4 bytes → the address check fails → exit 1.
